summary: Iteration 79 - Purchase Voucher Stock Integration Tests - ALL PASSED. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 features verified. The bug where PV-purchased Rice (Usna) was not showing in Dashboard/Stock is now FIXED.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test PV with Rice (Usna) 100Q during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Voucher stock integration complete. Rice (Usna) and other items purchased via PV are now correctly reflected in: (1) Dashboard Rice Stock card with 'Purchase se kharida' line, (2) Sale Book stock-items dropdown, (3) Byproduct stock with purchased_qntl field. Low Stock Alert banner removed from Purchase Vouchers page.

details: Returns purchased_qntl field (total PV rice)
Returns purchased_usna_qntl field (Rice Usna from PV)
Returns purchased_raw_qntl field (Rice Raw from PV)
Returns sb_sold_qntl field (Sale Voucher sold)
available_qntl = produced + purchased - DC - pvt_sold - sb_sold (formula verified)
Rice (Usna) includes PV purchased quantity in available
Rice (Raw) includes PV purchased quantity in available
Byproducts (Bran, Kunda, etc.) include PV purchased quantities
FRK includes PV purchased quantity
Custom items from PV are also included
Each byproduct (bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk) has purchased_qntl field
available_qntl = produced + purchased - sold (formula verified for all)
Shows 'Purchase se kharida: + 5000 Qntl' line (green/emerald)
Available Stock correctly adds PV purchases (5000 Qntl in test)
data-testid='rice-purchased' present for line item
No [data-testid='pv-low-stock-alert'] element present
No 'Low Stock Alert' text on the page
Stock overview cards still visible without alert banner
Creating PV with Rice (Usna) 100Q increases rice-stock by 100Q
Deleting the PV returns stock to original value
Stock items dropdown reflects changes immediately
Existing PV with Rice (Usna) 5000Q (Sahu Ji) is counted in stock
API purchased_usna_qntl matches sum of all PV Rice (Usna) items

test_classes: TestRiceStockWithPurchaseVouchers (2 tests) - purchased_qntl fields and formula
TestPurchaseVoucherCreateDelete (1 test) - Create/delete PV updates stock
TestSaleBookStockItems (3 tests) - rice, byproducts, FRK in stock-items

frontend_test_summary.purchase_vouchers_low_stock_alert: PASSED - Alert element count: 0, text count: 0

bug_fixed.original_issue: User purchased Rice (Usna) 500Q via Purchase Voucher but it was NOT showing in Dashboard Rice Stock, Sale Voucher stock items, DC stock, or Stock Summary
bug_fixed.root_cause: Rice stock API did not fetch purchase_vouchers collection to include PV-purchased rice
fix_applied: milling.py get_rice_stock: Added purchase_vouchers fetch and aggregation for Rice items
milling.py get_byproduct_stock: Added purchase_vouchers fetch for byproduct items
salebook.py get_stock_items: Added purchase_vouchers fetch for all stock items
Dashboard.jsx: Added 'Purchase se kharida' line when purchases > 0
PurchaseVouchers.jsx: Removed Low Stock Alert banner as requested
bug_fixed.verification: Backend API now returns purchased_qntl=5000 for existing PV data. Dashboard shows the line. Stock dropdown has correct quantities.

screenshots: .screenshots/pv_section.png - Purchase Vouchers page without Low Stock Alert
